auth_notes: Requires an API Key generated from the LoadPlanning.com dashboard, typically passed in the HTTP header as 'X-API-Key' or 'Authorization: Bearer'.
rate_limits: Typically limited to 60 requests per minute depending on the subscription tier.
gotchas: Highly sensitive to unit of measurement consistency (metric vs imperial) across all items.
Complex nested JSON structures required for 3D coordinate mapping of cargo.
Optimization timeouts can occur with very large item sets (over 200 items).
client_must_provide: Detailed Cargo list (length, width, height, weight, and stackability constraints)
research_notes: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. The primary challenge is the 'Calculate' endpoint which requires a deeply nested JSON body. Users will likely need to use a 'Function' or 'Code' node before the HTTP Request to transform flat data into the specific hierarchical format required for 3D load optimization.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. The primary challenge is the 'Calculate' endpoint which requires a deeply nested JSON body. Users will likely need to use a 'Function' or 'Code' node before the HTTP Request to transform flat data into the specific hierarchical format required for 3D load optimization.
